founders.name: John Adams
founders.tagline: The most Shakespearean Founder by citation; 53 verbatim quotations across six decades.

founders.name: Benjamin Franklin
founders.tagline: Shakespeare absorbed as a habit. Highest archaic-form density of any Founder.

founders.name: Thomas Jefferson
founders.tagline: Strategic Shakespearean — 23 named references, deployed with care; one verbatim *Julius Caesar*.

founders.name: George Washington
founders.tagline: Less literary than the others, but the 1778 "band of brothers" passes through his pen.

founders.name: James Madison
founders.tagline: Administratively careful prose. No verbatim Shakespeare and no named reference in 8,584 documents.

founders.name: Alexander Hamilton
founders.tagline: The Hamilton silence. Zero verbatim Shakespeare. Zero shared HIGH-bin stylistic types with Shakespeare under CFA.
